channel.title: ssh on Kang's blog
channel.description: Recent content in ssh on Kang's blog

item.title: ssh连接服务器图形界面
item.description: You have to confirm X is already installed in your server and can be reached. Then in your personal computer: 1 vim ~/.ssh/config Find and edit 1 2 3 4 5 Host * ## this * represent the host name ForwardAgent yes ForwardX11 yes ForwardX11Trusted yes Then enable GUI from server displayed in your computer: 1 xhost + username@servername Finally, you can login the server with GUI: 1 ssh -X
